blog.title: Why Commercial Laundry Is Still a Maturing Manufacturing Category in India
blog.excerpt: India has made strong progress in manufacturing across many sectors. However, when it comes to commercial laundry machines for hotels and large institutions, there is still a noticeable gap between locally manufactured systems and globally proven commercial technology.
blog.content:
India has made strong progress in manufacturing across many sectors. However, when it comes to commercial laundry machines for hotels and large institutions, there is still a noticeable gap between locally manufactured systems and globally proven commercial technology.

This is not a question of intent or affordability. It is a question of performance at scale.

Commercial laundry environments are demanding. Machines operate continuously, handle heavy loads, and are expected to deliver consistent results with minimal downtime. In these conditions, small design and control limitations quickly translate into higher operating costs and reduced reliability.

At first glance, many locally manufactured machines appear adequate. They perform basic wash and dry functions and may work well in low-volume or intermittent-use settings.

However, commercial laundry performance is measured over thousands of cycles, not initial operation. Differences in motor control, extraction capability, water management, automation, and monitoring become increasingly visible as volume and usage intensity increase.

In real-world operations, these gaps compound quickly. Lower extraction leaves linen wetter, increasing drying time and energy consumption. Manual or less precise dosing raises water and chemical usage while reducing wash consistency. Limited automation and diagnostics delay issue detection and increase operational strain.

Over time, this results in higher utility costs, reduced daily capacity, faster linen wear, and greater vulnerability during peak demand.

This is not a permanent assessment. Indian manufacturing capability is evolving rapidly, and progress is clearly visible.

But today, for high-volume, mission-critical commercial laundry operations, consistency, efficiency, and uptime still favor globally proven systems.

That is why many hotels and large institutions continue to rely on them.

blog.title: Why Linen Management Directly Impacts Hotel Revenue
blog.excerpt: In most hotels, linen management is treated as a back-of-house function. Necessary, but operational. Something handled quietly behind the scenes.
blog.content:
In most hotels, linen management is treated as a back-of-house function. Necessary, but operational. Something handled quietly behind the scenes.

But linen quality, availability, and turnaround time directly shape guest experience — and guest experience directly shapes revenue.

blog.title: The Silent Killer in Hospital Linen
blog.excerpt: India's most trusted hospitals are known for spotless corridors, advanced ICUs, and cutting-edge medical technology.
blog.content:
India's most trusted hospitals are known for spotless corridors, advanced ICUs, and cutting-edge medical technology.

Yet behind the scenes, hospital linen hygiene remains one of the most underestimated infection risks in healthcare operations.

blog.title: The Hidden Cost of Outdated Laundry Systems — And Here's the Fix
blog.excerpt: Every day, hotels and hospitals lose millions without even noticing. The culprit sits quietly behind the scenes — outdated laundry systems.
blog.content:
Every day, hotels and hospitals lose millions without even noticing. The culprit sits quietly behind the scenes — outdated laundry systems.

Higher water bills, longer cycles, linen damage, and downtime during peak hours all add up to hidden operational losses.

about.title: About Us
about.intro:
Laundrex is a reliable partner in laundry & dry cleaning room solutions since a decade. We offer thoughtfully designed, innovative and sustainable solutions for laundry & dry-cleaning industry, with products such as Washer Extractors, Barrier Washers, Tumble Driers, Flat Work Ironers, Chest Ironers, Automatic Feeders, Automatic Folders and Stackers & Tunnel Washers. Working in partnership with the best brands in the industry allows us to bring you the latest innovations to keep your business operating in most economical way by saving energy. All our products are technologically innovative, with exceptional quality which exceeds the highest Industrial standards.

We deal with the world's best & leading laundry machine manufacturing Companies.

We believe in bringing brands who are having constant innovation in the design and manufacturing processes of the machines to influence the energy and water saving which are the key points in today's environmentally conscious world.

We constantly striving to produce reliable and durable solutions which are satisfying quality requirements of the most demanding customers. By offering the high-quality products, we ensure the trouble-free working environment at your laundry & dry-cleaning unit.
about.mission:
We are one of the known supplier of laundry, dry cleaning & pressing machines in India. We mix high quality equipment, continuous technological innovation and an unmatched level of high quality service into single package. Experience, dedication and qualification are the key components which ensure that our services are delivered with the highest standards of quality.

Laundrex provide an efficient solution for any type of requirement concerning the provision of Laundry & Dry-cleaning machines & consultancy services. We listen from the customers carefully and in depth to provide solutions specifically suitable to them. We structure your needs in a clear and transparent development plan that focuses on achieving both practical and efficient solutions.

We represent some of the world's leading laundry equipment manufacturers. So when you're looking for a solution for your needs, we'll help you find the right fit - faster. We offer the best suitable equipment at affordable investment.

We provide outstanding sales, service and support based on pro-active relationship building, in-depth product knowledge, seasoned industry experience and dependable follow through.
about.vision:
Quality

We constantly striving to produce reliable and durable solutions which are satisfying quality requirements of the most demanding customers. By offering the high-quality products, we ensure the trouble-free working environment at your laundry & dry-cleaning unit. Because of our high-quality machines, we can achieve the energy cost significantly.

Comprehensive Service:

After-sales service is very important to us as a way of ensuring that you are always able to work with our products safely and with prominent level of satisfaction. Our technicians and installation engineers advise customers on site and plan systems depending on their specific demands, using our vast knowledge and expertise.

Maintenance:

Correctly maintained machinery is equivalent to a guarantee of quality. Therefore, we look after the minutest detail of the machinery on which we are working. We distribute the preventive maintenance manuals and train your staff to maintain the machines as per the standards. Our online machine maintenance & service reporting system will help you & us to maintain the machines.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.intro: Sustainability is not just a buzzword for us. It's how we design, build, and run every on-premise hotel laundry—lowering your cost per kg while shrinking water, energy, and chemical footprints, with proof you can audit. Impact at a glance: 40% reduction in water usage, 70% reduction in carbon emissions, 450+ million liters of water saved, and ~160 million kg of carbon cut across partner properties.

products.description:
Washer Extractors are characterized by their compact, robust design and reliable technology. The computer panel has super UI and excellent programs to ease the washing process. User can control work liquid-level, wash temperature, wash time and efficiently satisfy with wash request in different situations. The high extraction speeds considerably reduce drying time, resulting in energy and time savings in the drying process.

Constructed with the latest advanced technologies, our Washer Extractor are rugged and can operate in heavy load conditions.

products.title: Open Pocket Washer Extractor
products.shortDescription: Open Pocket Washer/Extractors feature are designed as two-way tilting for safe, easy loading and unloading. Sealion makes the most of G-forces in the extraction process with increased cylinder diamete
products.description:
Open Pocket Washer/Extractors feature are designed as two-way tilting for safe, easy loading and unloading. Sealion makes the most of G-forces in the extraction process with increased cylinder diameters, providing maximum, efficient water removal.

Open Pocket Washer/Extractors were designed to smoothly integrate into various plant layouts. These machines offer the largest processing capability in the industry to conserve the floor space. This is significant as operators look to maximize their productivity in their existing facilities. These type of washer extractors are designed and engineered for ease of use, space allocation limitation concerns and ergonomics. A unique feature to these machines is that the suspension has been redesigned to reduce the washer/extractor’s profile and to provide a reduction in vibration.

products.title: Barrier Washer Extractor
products.shortDescription: Barrier Washer Extractor with clean/unclean sides provide the ideal solution for processing laundry in hospitals and laundries. Sealion barrier washer extractors are designed to reduces risk of Hospit
products.description:
Barrier Washer Extractor with clean/unclean sides provide the ideal solution for processing laundry in hospitals and laundries. Sealion barrier washer extractors are designed to reduces risk of Hospital-Acquired-Infection (HAI) in hospital theatre linen laundries.

The 6th generation microprocessors enables a simple and easy to use control system for the user. This free-standing machine has a stainless-steel cabinet, drum and tub. The door of this machine is big enough to allow easy loading and unloading of clothes. This is an ideal solution for sanitary washing in hospitals because it can prevent the washing stuff from being contaminated after cleaned by the germs during the loading and unloading process in the un-clean area.

products.title: Tumble Driers
products.shortDescription: dryers have been developed to ensure high productivity with a minimal use of energy. Shorter drying time means less wear of the fabric resulting in a longer life time and significant cost savings.
products.description:
dryers have been developed to ensure high productivity with a minimal use of energy. Shorter drying time means less wear of the fabric resulting in a longer life time and significant cost savings.

With the function of automatic control and timer drying; the drum can run in clockwise and anti-lock wise. Large self-cleaning lint screen and large lint compartment for easy maintenance. Our energy saving features, plus our robust design ensures low cost ownership & infrequent maintenance.

Our tumblers achieve the perfect balance between drying temperature, airflow pattern and usable cylinder space for maximum energy efficiency, shortening drying times - and reducing your utility and labor costs. The large diameter of the door opening on our tumble dryers ensures easy loading and unloading.

products.title: Automatic Clamp Feeder
products.shortDescription: Automatic Clamp Feeder is a revolutionary product in our profile which ease the linen feeding problems to the ironer. Usually, manual feeding leads to a less productivity but this machine combines opt
products.description:
Automatic Clamp Feeder is a revolutionary product in our profile which ease the linen feeding problems to the ironer. Usually, manual feeding leads to a less productivity but this machine combines optimal feeding with high speed. The Clamp feeder is available in single, two and three feeding stations with 3 meters and 3.3 meters width.

Each feeding station has two sets of feeding clamps, positioned opposite to each other. This allows the operator to feed the linen sheets faster.

The feeding clamps hand over the linen to the two sets of spreading clamps. The spreading clamps are servo driven and run on motor driven toothed belts, which ensures that the linen is swiftly and accurately spread. he spreading clamps can transfer the item immediately after spreading and pick up the next one from one of the three stations. This way, availability of the clamps for the operators is increased.

products.title: Automatic Vacuum Feeder
products.shortDescription: Vacuum Feeder is a powerful and extremely compact feeder designed to produce more linen with the best quality leading and trailing edges and minimum effort in high volume feeding applications. Vacuum
products.description:
Vacuum Feeder is a powerful and extremely compact feeder designed to produce more linen with the best quality leading and trailing edges and minimum effort in high volume feeding applications. Vacuum feeder is fitted with a high efficiency ventilator system, which provides an excellent vacuum and rapid agitating air stream with lower power characteristics than other comparable products.

The high-speed input rollers together with vacuum hold on the feed bands will ensure maximum tail end agitating and smoothing even the smaller articles. The operator just has to place the linen above the front edge of the specially designed vacuum chamber which then stretches and holds wet linen firmly on the feed conveyor. A high-speed roll helps to rapidly advice pieces through the system so operators can quickly handle the next linen.

products.title: Flat Work Ironer
products.shortDescription: Flat Work Ironers produces high quality linen finishes easily and efficiently. The cylinder is mirror polished and supported by heavy-duty lubricated bearings. A highly sensitive hand protection board
products.description:
Flat Work Ironers produces high quality linen finishes easily and efficiently. The cylinder is mirror polished and supported by heavy-duty lubricated bearings. A highly sensitive hand protection board ensures ultimate safety in each phase of the ironing process. Our frequency conversion speed adjustment system allows for a continual even flow of speed which brings more energy saving.

The frame is built with high quality carbon steel primed and painted for long life. The cylinder is mirror polished and supported by heavy-duty lubricated bearings.

A large efficient fan pulls evaporated moisture away from the cylinder. Nomex ironing straps that prevent absorption of moisture while ironing extends the life of all feed compartments. The compact design occupies very little space as the finished linen can be discharged to the front or in the back to a folder

products.title: Automatic Linen Folder
products.shortDescription: Folders can fold the dried & ironed linens automatically with perfect folding. Fully automatic and intelligent control system with big LCD screen enables extremely efficient Linen folding. The compute
products.description:
Folders can fold the dried & ironed linens automatically with perfect folding. Fully automatic and intelligent control system with big LCD screen enables extremely efficient Linen folding. The computer screen has dialogic function. Inverter driven to synchronize with the speed of Ironer

Folding programs can be selected according to different types of linen. 2-5 folds can be performed under the control of the computer. Five times of folding can be controlled under the monitor of intelligent computer system.

Photoelectric detection and speed testing system control cloth transmission speed and precisely fold based on measuring cloth size.

Self-diagnostic and safety protection system, easy operation and daily maintenance.

products.title: Dry Cleaning Machine
products.shortDescription: Dry-cleaning machines are packed with high-performance and exclusive features that guarantee you the finest cleaning possible at the lowest cost. The ergonomic design produces exceptional cleaning as
products.description:
Dry-cleaning machines are packed with high-performance and exclusive features that guarantee you the finest cleaning possible at the lowest cost. The ergonomic design produces exceptional cleaning as well as convenient and easy access to all components for quick maintenance. 6th generation computerized control system with separated manual operations. Easy to use, totally programmable, with a series of programs studied within the factory.

Prominent level recoveries up to 99.6% provide a very low workable cost per Garment. Eco friendly dual lint filter, large loading door with automatic locking and automatic tank to tank solvent transfer.

The design of larger wash basket with smaller depths ensures more stability and vibration even on highest extraction speeds and on greater G force.

products.title: Professional Garment Pressing Machines
products.shortDescription: Laundrex Press USA pressing machines are one of the most versatile machine in the industry which offers the best pressing for laundry & dry cleaning of garments. Designed with efficiency in mind, the mach
products.description: Laundrex Press USA pressing machines are one of the most versatile machine in the industry which offers the best pressing for laundry & dry cleaning of garments. Designed with efficiency in mind, the machines will provide the best possible finish in the least amount of time. Two Cylinder Design - one cylinder closes press head at consistent speeds and a second cylinder applies desired pressure. Equipped with Sleeve and stainless-steel iron stand. Timer operated. Rigid construction with Stainless steel heat proof vacuum cylinder. Simple installation and require a less space and energy.
